top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 6.4 s, performance score 67, persistently below 85 across many consecutive audits): preload the hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF at mobile-appropriate dimensions, and defer render-blocking resources above the fold.
issue_title: Homepage performance 67 (LCP 6.4 s) — persistent multi-audit regression; /about still empty placeholder with SEO 83
issue_body:
## Homepage performance remains persistently below 85

The homepage (`/`) scored **67** on today's mobile Lighthouse audit (2026-07-20), with LCP at **6,427 ms** — a +3 pt uptick from yesterday's 64 but firmly within jitter; no structural fix has been applied and the score has remained below 85 across every recent audit.

### Current metrics (mobile) — `/`
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 67 | +3 pts (within jitter, still well below 85) |
| LCP | 6,427 ms | +5 ms (effectively stable, critically slow) |
| CLS | 0.015 | stable |
| TBT | 207 ms | +19 ms (within jitter) |

### Suggested fix
Preload the LCP hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF sized for mobile viewports, and defer render-blocking stylesheets/scripts above the fold. This recommendation has been open across multiple consecutive audits without action.

---

## Still open — `/about` placeholder

`/about` remains an empty placeholder (stub text "This is an about page" only — no nav, no footer, no real content). SEO score is **83**, below the 85 threshold. Unchanged across multiple consecutive audits.

### Suggested fix
Build out the About page with real content, navigation, and footer. This will also resolve the below-threshold SEO score.

---

## `/projects` and `/projects/screenshot-to-primevue` worth monitoring

- `/projects` held at 82 (stable within jitter, but has not recovered above 85 across multiple audits).
- `/projects/screenshot-to-primevue` dropped to 84 (-4 pts, within jitter) — approaching the 85 threshold; watch next audit.
